---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a calculation error, UI glitch, or unexpected behavior
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Affected Ticker / Section

- **Ticker:** (e.g., `BAJAJ-AUTO.NS`, `MSFT`, `VWAGY`)
- **Section or Page:** (e.g., Section 5 DCF, Researcher → Sector Opportunity Map, Compare page)
- **Date analyzed:** (UTC timestamp from the "gespeicherte Analyse" badge)

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to see (correct value, working UI, etc.).

## Actual Behavior

What you actually see — include exact numbers, screenshots, or the Rechenweg trace if the issue is calculation-related.

## Reproduction Steps

1. Go to '…'
2. Click on '…'
3. Enter ticker '…'
4. Observe the issue

## Rechenweg / Calculation Trace (for DCF / Catalyst / WACC issues)

Paste the relevant `steps[]` output from the Rechenweg expand-box:

```
=== FCFF-Projektion (10 Jahre) ===
…
```

## Environment

- **Device:** (Desktop / Mobile / Tablet)
- **Browser:** (Chrome 125, Safari 17, Firefox 126, etc.)
- **Viewport width:** (375px mobile, 1440px desktop, etc.)
- **OS:** (macOS 15, Windows 11, iOS 18, Android 14)

## Additional Context

Links to news articles, Peer-comparison screenshots, or similar valuations from other tools (Seeking Alpha, Morningstar) that support the bug report.

## Checklist

- [ ] I've checked that this isn't a duplicate issue
- [ ] I've included the exact ticker and analysis timestamp
- [ ] I've attached a screenshot (for UI issues) or Rechenweg trace (for calculation issues)
- [ ] I understand this tool is for educational purposes and doesn't constitute investment advice
